2606.28465.title: SVC-Probe: A Framework for Evaluating Perturbation Generalization in Spatial Foundation-Model Embeddings
2606.28465.paper_summary: This work examines perturbation generalization in spatial foundation-model embeddings derived from fluorescence microscopy images. Although these models can discriminate drug conditions accurately, it remains unclear whether the learned representations reflect patterns consistent with expected perturbation axes that transfer across drugs. We introduce SVC-Probe, a perturbation-aware framework that combines Subcellular Embedding Atlas Stability, Mondrian Neighborhood Graphs, and a Foundation Model Perturbation Probe to assess embedding stability, neighborhood rewiring, and centroid prediction under drug treatment. Applied to the CM4AI MDA-MB-468 chemical-perturbation atlas comprising 462 antibody labels and SubCell 1536-dimensional embeddings, SVC-Probe demonstrates that 98.6% three-way condition accuracy does not correlate with reliable cross-drug prediction, with cosine similarity diminishing from 0.944 in-domain to 0.30 under leave-one-drug-out evaluation, constituting a two-drug stress test rather than a general benchmark. Null calibration indicates that raw residual-turnover coupling is largely influenced by generic embedding structure, whereas a drug-specific signal emerges under vorinostat and is consistent with chromatin-related reorganization. In contrast, the paclitaxel axis is not robustly reconstructed, likely due to sparse coverage of microtubule-associated proteins. Together, these results introduce and demonstrate a reusable diagnostic framework for stress-testing spatial virtual-cell representations and indicate that perturbation generalization may serve as a stricter and more informative benchmark than baseline condition discrimination.
2606.28465.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究探討了來自螢光顯微鏡影像的空間基礎模型嵌入中的擾動泛化。儘管這些模型能夠準確區分藥物條件，但尚不清楚所學的表示是否反映與預期擾動軸一致的模式，這些模式在不同藥物之間轉移。我們引入了 SVC-Probe，一個擾動感知框架，結合了亞細胞嵌入圖譜穩定性、蒙德里安鄰域圖和基礎模型擾動探針，以評估嵌入穩定性、鄰域重組和在藥物治療下的質心預測。應用於 CM4AI MDA-MB-468 化學擾動圖譜，該圖譜包含 462 種抗體標籤和 SubCell 1536 維嵌入，SVC-Probe 顯示 98.6% 的三向條件準確率與可靠的跨藥物預測並不相關，餘弦相似度從域內的 0.944 減少到留一藥物評估下的 0.30，構成一個兩藥物壓力測試，而非一般基準。零校準表明，原始殘差周轉耦合在很大程度上受到通用嵌入結構的影響，而在 vorinostat 下出現的藥物特異性信號與染色質相關的重組一致。相對而言，紫杉醇軸並未被穩健地重建，可能是由於微管相關蛋白的稀疏覆蓋。總體而言，這些結果引入並展示了一個可重用的診斷框架，用於壓力測試空間虛擬細胞表示，並表明擾動泛化可能作為比基線條件區分更嚴格且更具信息性的基準。
2606.28465.author: Jake Y. Chen et.al.
2606.28465.authors: Jake Y. Chen, Huu Phong Nguyen, Fuad Al Abir, Ehsan Saghapour
